# Vježba 2 — Viskoznost i površinska napetost

Ova vježba obrađuje pojam viskoznosti kao unutarnjeg trenja fluida te površinsku napetost. Naučit ćete primjenjivati Newtonov zakon viskoznosti na različite geometrije i razumjeti kapilarne pojave.

## Fizikalni uvod

Viskoznost predstavlja otpor fluida prema gibanju, odnosno unutarnje trenje koje se javlja zbog međumolekularnih sila. Kada se fluid giba, slojevi fluida se opiru međusobnom klizanju, što rezultira smičnim naprezanjem. Newtonov zakon viskoznosti opisuje linearnu ovisnost naprezanja o gradijentu brzine.

$$\tau = \mu \frac{dv}{dy}$$

Gdje je:  
- $\tau$ [Pa] – smično naprezanje  
- $\mu$ [Pa·s] – dinamička viskoznost  
- $dv/dy$ [1/s] – gradijent brzine (promjena brzine po visini sloja)

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Osnove viskoznosti (Newtonov zakon) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-visc-basics">
    <style>
        #widget-visc-basics { max-width: 920px; margin: 0 auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
        #widget-visc-basics .widget-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; text-align: center; }
        #widget-visc-basics .widget-subtitle { margin: 0 0 20px; text-align: center; color: #475569; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.5; }
        #widget-visc-basics .controls { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 14px; background: #fff; padding: 16px; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 18px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
        #widget-visc-basics .control-card { background: #fff; padding: 4px; }
        #widget-visc-basics .control-card label { display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; color: #334155; margin-bottom: 8px; }
        #widget-visc-basics .control-card span { color: #2563eb; }
        #widget-visc-basics input[type="range"] { width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb; }
        #widget-visc-basics .canvas-wrapper { width: 100%; position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; }
        #widget-visc-basics canvas { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metrics { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin-top: 16px; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-item { text-align: center; background: #0f172a; color: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 12px; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-label { font-size: 0.7rem; opacity: 0.8; display: block; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 4px; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-value { font-family: monospace; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: bold; color: #93c5fd; }
    </style>

    <div class="widget-header">
        <h3 class="widget-title">Vizualizacija Newtonovog zakona viskoznosti</h3>
        <p class="widget-subtitle">Gornja ploča povlači fluid, slojevi klize jedan preko drugoga, a linearni profil brzine stvara smično naprezanje.</p>
    </div>
    
    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-card">
            <label>Brzina ploče (v): <span id="v-val">1.0</span> m/s</label>
            <input type="range" id="v-slider" min="0.1" max="5.0" value="1.0" step="0.1">
        </div>
        <div class="control-card">
            <label>Viskoznost (μ): <span id="mu-val">0.1</span> Pa·s</label>
            <input type="range" id="mu-slider" min="0.01" max="1.0" value="0.1" step="0.01">
        </div>
        <div class="control-card">
            <label>Zračnost (δ): <span id="h-slider-val">10</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="h-slider" min="2" max="30" value="10" step="1">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="canvas-wrapper">
        <canvas id="visc-canvas" width="860" height="320"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div class="metrics">
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">Gradijent brzine (dv/dy)</span><span class="metric-value" id="grad-out">100</span> s⁻¹</div>
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">Smicajno naprezanje (τ)</span><span class="metric-value" id="tau-out">10.0</span> Pa</div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('visc-canvas');
        const ctx_b = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const vSl = document.getElementById('v-slider');
        const muSl = document.getElementById('mu-slider');
        const hSl = document.getElementById('h-slider');

        let particles = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < 120; i++) {
            particles.push({
                x: Math.random(),
                y: Math.random(),
                size: 1.4 + Math.random() * 1.6
            });
        }

        function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r, fill, stroke) {
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x + r, y);
            ctx.arcTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + h, r);
            ctx.arcTo(x + w, y + h, x, y + h, r);
            ctx.arcTo(x, y + h, x, y, r);
            ctx.arcTo(x, y, x + w, y, r);
            ctx.closePath();
            if (fill) ctx.fill();
            if (stroke) ctx.stroke();
        }

        function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width) {
            const headlen = 8;
            const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
            ctx_b.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx_b.fillStyle = color;
            ctx_b.lineWidth = width;
            ctx_b.beginPath();
            ctx_b.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctx_b.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctx_b.stroke();
            ctx_b.beginPath();
            ctx_b.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx_b.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
            ctx_b.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
            ctx_b.fill();
        }

        function draw_b() {
            const v = parseFloat(vSl.value);
            const mu = parseFloat(muSl.value);
            const h_mm = parseFloat(hSl.value);
            const h_px = h_mm * 5.2; 
            
            const dv_dy = v / (h_mm / 1000);
            const tau = mu * dv_dy;

            document.getElementById('v-val').textContent = v.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('mu-val').textContent = mu.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('h-slider-val').textContent = h_mm;
            document.getElementById('grad-out').textContent = Math.round(dv_dy);
            document.getElementById('tau-out').textContent = tau.toFixed(1);

            ctx_b.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const centerY = canvas.height / 2 + 8;
            const topY = centerY - h_px/2;
            const botY = centerY + h_px/2;
            const chamberLeft = 110;
            const chamberWidth = 560;
            const chamberRight = chamberLeft + chamberWidth;

            ctx_b.fillStyle = "#ffffff";
            ctx_b.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const fluidGrad = ctx_b.createLinearGradient(0, topY, 0, botY);
            fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(125, 211, 252, ${0.15 + mu * 0.1})`);
            fluidGrad.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(59, 130, 246, ${0.1 + mu * 0.2})`);
            fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, `rgba(125, 211, 252, ${0.15 + mu * 0.1})`);
            ctx_b.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
            ctx_b.fillRect(chamberLeft, topY, chamberWidth, h_px);

            // Donja ploča
            ctx_b.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            roundRect(ctx_b, chamberLeft, botY, chamberWidth, 12, 4, true, false);

            // Gornja ploča
            const offset = (Date.now() * 0.0012 * v * 120) % 34;
            ctx_b.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            roundRect(ctx_b, chamberLeft, topY - 12, chamberWidth, 12, 4, true, false);

            // Particles
            particles.forEach((p) => {
                const u = v * (1 - p.y);
                const speedRatio = u / Math.max(v, 0.0001);
                p.x += 0.0015 + speedRatio * 0.012;
                if (p.x > 1.03) p.x = -0.03;
                const px = chamberLeft + p.x * chamberWidth;
                const py = topY + p.y * h_px;
                ctx_b.fillStyle = `rgba(3, 105, 161, ${0.2 + speedRatio * 0.65})`;
                ctx_b.beginPath(); ctx_b.arc(px, py, p.size, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx_b.fill();
            });

            for (let i = 0; i <= 6; i++) {
                const f = i / 6;
                const y = botY - f * h_px;
                const arrowL = Math.max(12, f * v * 42);
                drawArrow(chamberLeft + 10, y, chamberLeft + 10 + arrowL, y, `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${0.4 + f * 0.6})`, 2);
            }

            const profileX = 720;
            const profileTop = topY;
            const profileHeight = h_px;
            
            ctx_b.strokeStyle = '#1d4ed8';
            ctx_b.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx_b.beginPath();
            for (let i = 0; i <= 20; i++) {
                const f = i / 20;
                const y = botY - f * h_px;
                const x = profileX + f * v * 10;
                if (i === 0) ctx_b.moveTo(x, y);
                else ctx_b.lineTo(x, y);
            }
            ctx_b.stroke();

            ctx_b.fillStyle = '#475569';
            ctx_b.font = '11px Inter';
            ctx_b.fillText('v = 0', chamberRight + 10, botY + 4);
            ctx_b.fillText('v = vmax', chamberRight + 10, topY);

            requestAnimationFrame(draw_b);
        }
        draw_b();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Što je gornja ploča brža ili je razmak među pločama manji, to je gradijent brzine strmiji. Veća viskoznost zatim taj gradijent pretvara u veće smično naprezanje.
</div>
```

***

### Nenewtonski fluidi

U inženjerskoj praksi mnogi fluidi ne slijede linearni Newtonov zakon. Njihovo ponašanje opisuje se **Power-law modelom**:

$$\tau = K \cdot \left( \frac{dv}{dy} \right)^n$$

- $n = 1$: Newtonski fluid (voda, zrak, ulje)
- $n < 1$: Pseudoplastični (shear-thinning) - npr. boja, krv, kečap
- $n > 1$: Dilatantni (shear-thickening) - npr. mješavina škroba i vode
- **Binghamova plastika**: Potreban je početni naprezanje $\tau_0$ da bi uopće potekli (npr. pasta za zube)

***


### Zadatak Z10 — Okretni moment na krnjem stošcu {.unnumbered}

Ulje dinamičke viskoznosti $\mu$ ispunjava zračnost $\delta$. Potrebno je odrediti izraz za okretni moment potreban za rotaciju krnjeg stošca konstantnom kutnom brzinom. Prilikom proračuna zanemariti utjecaj gornjeg i donjeg horizontalnog dijela krnjeg stošca.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>

#### Zadano
| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $\mu, \delta$ | viskoznost i zračnost |
| $\omega$ | konst. kutna brzina |
| $\alpha, a, b, y$ | geometrija |

</div>
<div>

#### Odrediti
- Okretni moment $T = ?$

</div>
</div>

**Rješenje:**

1. **Geometrija:** Radijus na visini $y$ je $r = y \cdot \tan\alpha$. Element površine plašta je $dA = 2\pi r \cdot ds = 2\pi (y \tan\alpha) \frac{dy}{\cos\alpha}$.
2. **Newtonov zakon:** Tangencijalno naprezanje je $\tau = \mu \frac{v}{\delta} = \mu \frac{\omega r}{\delta} = \frac{\mu \omega y \tan\alpha}{\delta}$.
3. **Moment sile:** Elementarni moment iznosi $dT = r \cdot \tau \cdot dA = (y \tan\alpha) \cdot \left( \frac{\mu \omega y \tan\alpha}{\delta} \right) \cdot \left( 2\pi y \tan\alpha \frac{dy}{\cos\alpha} \right)$.
4. **Integracija:** Ukupni moment dobivamo integracijom po visini od $a$ do $a+b$:
$$T = \int_a^{a+b} \frac{2\pi \mu \omega \tan^3\alpha}{\delta \cos\alpha} y^3 dy = \mathbf{\frac{\pi \mu \omega \tan^3\alpha}{2 \delta \cos\alpha} [(a+b)^4 - a^4]}$$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- GEOMETRIJSKI WIDGET ZA ZADATAK 10 -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z10-vfinal" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <style>
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-v7-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-v7-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .canvas-stack-v7 { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .canvas-box-v7 { position: relative; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .box-label-v7 { position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 15px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: bold; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .results-panel-v7 { background: #0f172a; color: #fff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; margin-top: 15px; }
    </style>

    <div class="z10-v7-grid">
        <div class="controls-panel">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:5px;">Visina baze (a): <span id="z10-v7-val-a">80</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-a" min="20" max="150" value="80" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:5px;">Visina stošca (b): <span id="z10-v7-val-b">150</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-b" min="50" max="250" value="150" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:5px;">Kut nagiba (α): <span id="z10-v7-val-alpha">30</span>°</label>
                <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-alpha" min="5" max="60" value="30" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600; color:#e53e3e; margin-bottom:5px;">Pozicija presjeka (y): <span id="z10-v7-val-y">150</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-y" min="20" max="400" value="150" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="results-panel-v7">
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem; opacity:0.8; text-transform:uppercase;">Ukupni moment (T)</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700; color:#93c5fd;"><span id="z10-v7-res-t">0.000</span> Nm</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="canvas-stack-v7">
            <div class="canvas-box-v7" style="height:250px;">
                <span class="box-label-v7">Nacrt</span>
                <canvas id="canvas-z10-v7-side" width="500" height="250" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="canvas-box-v7" style="height:200px; background:#fff;">
                <span class="box-label-v7">Profil brzine u presjeku</span>
                <canvas id="canvas-z10-v7-top" width="500" height="200" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cSide = document.getElementById('canvas-z10-v7-side');
        const cTop = document.getElementById('canvas-z10-v7-top');
        if (!cSide || !cTop) return;
        const ctx_s10 = cSide.getContext('2d');
        const ctx_t10 = cTop.getContext('2d');
        
        const slA = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-a');
        const slB = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-b');
        const slAlpha = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-alpha');
        const slY = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-y');

        function update_z10() {
            const a = parseFloat(slA.value);
            const b = parseFloat(slB.value);
            const alpha_deg = parseFloat(slAlpha.value);
            const alpha = alpha_deg * Math.PI / 180;
            
            slY.min = a;
            slY.max = a + b;
            let y = parseFloat(slY.value);
            if(y < a) y = a; if(y > a+b) y = a+b;

            const mu = 0.1; const omega = 200; const delta = 0.0012;
            const r_y = y * Math.tan(alpha);
            
            const a_m = a/1000, b_m = b/1000;
            const term = (Math.pow(a_m + b_m, 4) - Math.pow(a_m, 4));
            const T = (Math.PI * mu * omega * Math.pow(Math.tan(alpha), 3) * term) / (2 * delta * Math.cos(alpha));

            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-a').textContent = a;
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-b').textContent = b;
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-alpha').textContent = alpha_deg;
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-y').textContent = Math.round(y);
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-res-t').textContent = T.toFixed(3);

            drawSide_z10(a, b, alpha, y);
            drawTop_z10(r_y, omega, delta);
        }

        function drawSide_z10(a, b, alpha, y_probe) {
            ctx_s10.clearRect(0,0,500,250);
            const cx = 250, base_line = 230, scale = 0.5;
            const r1 = a * Math.tan(alpha) * scale;
            const r2 = (a+b) * Math.tan(alpha) * scale;
            const y1 = base_line - a * scale;
            const y2 = base_line - (a+b) * scale;
            
            ctx_s10.beginPath();
            ctx_s10.moveTo(cx - r1, y1); ctx_s10.lineTo(cx + r1, y1);
            ctx_s10.lineTo(cx + r2, y2); ctx_s10.lineTo(cx - r2, y2);
            ctx_s10.closePath();
            ctx_s10.fillStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)"; ctx_s10.fill();
            ctx_s10.strokeStyle = "#1e293b"; ctx_s10.lineWidth = 2; ctx_s10.stroke();
            
            const r_p = y_probe * Math.tan(alpha) * scale;
            const py = base_line - y_probe * scale;
            ctx_s10.strokeStyle = "#ef4444"; ctx_s10.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx_s10.beginPath(); ctx_s10.moveTo(cx - r_p, py); ctx_s10.lineTo(cx + r_p, py); ctx_s10.stroke();
        }

        function drawTop_z10(r_mm, omega, delta_m) {
            ctx_t10.clearRect(0,0,500,200);
            const cx = 250, cy = 100;
            const r_px = Math.min(80, r_mm * 0.5);
            const delta_px = 30;
            
            ctx_t10.beginPath(); ctx_t10.arc(cx, cy, r_px + delta_px, 0, Math.PI*2);
            ctx_t10.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctx_t10.lineWidth = 2; ctx_t10.stroke();
            
            ctx_t10.beginPath(); ctx_t10.arc(cx, cy, r_px, 0, Math.PI*2);
            ctx_t10.fillStyle = "#334155"; ctx_t10.fill();
            
            const rot = (Date.now() * 0.001) % (Math.PI * 2);
            for(let i=0; i<8; i++) {
                const angle = (i/8) * Math.PI * 2 + rot;
                const cosA = Math.cos(angle), sinA = Math.sin(angle);
                const x1 = cx + cosA * r_px, y1 = cy + sinA * r_px;
                const x2 = cx + cosA * (r_px + delta_px), y2 = cy + sinA * (r_px + delta_px);
                ctx_t10.strokeStyle = "#2563eb"; ctx_t10.lineWidth = 1.5;
                ctx_t10.beginPath(); ctx_t10.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx_t10.lineTo(x1 - sinA * 30, y1 + cosA * 30); ctx_t10.stroke();
            }
            requestAnimationFrame(() => drawTop_z10(r_mm, omega, delta_m));
        }

        [slA, slB, slAlpha, slY].forEach(s => s.oninput = update_z10);
        update_z10();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Okretni moment ovisi o četvrtoj potenciji polumjera ($y \tan \alpha$), što znači da gornji širi dijelovi stošca doprinose momentu znatno više nego donji uži dijelovi.
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z11 — Proračun snage rotacije {.unnumbered}

Krnji stožac rotira konstantnom kutnom brzinom od $200 \, \text{rad/s}$ unutar spremnika napunjenog uljem SAE 10W. Ukoliko pretpostavimo konstantnu debljinu sloja ulja sa svih strana krnjeg stošca od $1,2 \, \text{mm}$, potrebno je odrediti snagu potrebnu za održavanje spomenute kutne brzine. Također odrediti i smanjenje potrebne snage kada se temperatura ulja povisi na $80 \, \text{°C}$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>

#### Zadano
| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $D, d, L$ | $0,12; 0,04; 0,12 \, \text{m}$ |
| $\omega$ | $200 \, \text{rad/s}$ |
| $\delta$ | $0,0012 \, \text{m}$ |
| $\mu_{20}, \mu_{80}$ | $0,1; 0,0078 \, \text{Pa s}$ |

</div>
<div>

#### Odrediti
- $P_{20} = ?$
- $\Delta P_{20-80} = ?$

</div>
</div>

**Rješenje:**

1. **Snaga na bazama:** $P_{baze} = \frac{\pi \mu \omega^2 (D^4 + d^4)}{32 \delta} = \mathbf{68,7 \, \text{W}}$.
2. **Snaga na plaštu:** $\tan\alpha = \frac{D-d}{2L} = 0,33 \implies \alpha = 18,4^\circ$.
   $P_{plašt} = \frac{\pi \mu \omega^2 (D^4 - d^4)}{32 \delta \sin\alpha} = \mathbf{211,9 \, \text{W}}$.
3. **Ukupna snaga (20 °C):** $P_{tot} = \mathbf{280,6 \, \text{W}}$.
4. **Pad snage na 80 °C:** $P_{80} = P_{20} \cdot \frac{0,0078}{0,1} = \mathbf{21,9 \, \text{W}}$ (Smanjenje za 92,2%).

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 11: Simulator rotacijskog trenja -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z11-v8" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <style>
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-v8-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.3fr; gap: 25px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { #widget-z11-v8 .z11-v8-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-z11-v8 .control-panel-v8 { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .gauge-container { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; margin-top: 15px; gap: 10px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .gauge-box { background: #0f172a; color: #fff; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; flex: 1; text-align: center; }
    </style>

    <div class="z11-v8-grid">
        <div class="control-panel-v8">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px;">Kutna brzina (ω): <span id="w-val-v8">200</span> rad/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="w-slider-v8" min="0" max="800" step="10" value="200" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px;">Temperatura (T): <span id="t-val-v8">20</span> °C</label>
                <input type="range" id="t-slider-v8" min="10" max="100" step="1" value="20" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="gauge-container">
                <div class="gauge-box">
                    <div style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.7; text-transform:uppercase;">Snaga (P)</div>
                    <div style="font-size:1.2rem; font-weight:bold; color:#93c5fd;"><span id="p-res-v8">0</span> W</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:15px;">
            <div style="position:relative; background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden; height:220px;">
                <canvas id="canvas-v8-sys" width="500" height="220" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cSys = document.getElementById('canvas-v8-sys');
        const ctx_s = cSys.getContext('2d');
        const wS = document.getElementById('w-slider-v8'), tS = document.getElementById('t-slider-v8');

        function getViscosity(baseMu, temp) {
            return baseMu * Math.exp(-0.035 * (temp - 20));
        }

        function update_v8() {
            const w = parseFloat(wS.value), T = parseFloat(tS.value);
            const mu = getViscosity(0.1, T);
            const d_m = 0.0012, R1 = 0.02, R2 = 0.06, L = 0.12;
            const alpha = Math.atan((R2-R1)/L);
            const Power = (Math.PI * mu * w*w * (Math.pow(R2,4)-Math.pow(R1,4))) / (2 * d_m * Math.sin(alpha));

            document.getElementById('t-val-v8').textContent = Math.round(T);
            document.getElementById('p-res-v8').textContent = Power.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('w-val-v8').textContent = w;

            ctx_s.clearRect(0,0,500,220);
            const cx = 250, cy = 110;
            ctx_s.fillStyle = "#334155";
            ctx_s.beginPath(); ctx_s.moveTo(cx-30, cy+60); ctx_s.lineTo(cx+30, cy+60); ctx_s.lineTo(cx+70, cy-60); ctx_s.lineTo(cx-70, cy-60); ctx_s.closePath(); ctx_s.fill();
            
            const rot = (Date.now() * 0.001 * w * 0.02) % 100;
            ctx_s.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.2)";
            ctx_s.setLineDash([5, 5]);
            ctx_s.stroke();
        }

        function anim_v8() { update_v8(); requestAnimationFrame(anim_v8); }
        anim_v8();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Viskoznost ulja dramatično pada s porastom temperature, što izravno smanjuje potrebnu snagu za rotaciju. Ovo je ključno u sustavima podmazivanja strojeva.
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z12 — Kapilarni porast (Voda vs Živa) {.unnumbered}

Pri temperaturi $60 \, \text{°C}$ površinska napetost žive iznosi $0,47 \, \text{N/m}$, dok je površinska napetost vode $0,0662 \, \text{N/m}$. Potrebno je odrediti promjene kapilarnog porasta visine dotičnih tekućina kada se nalaze u kontaktu sa zrakom unutar staklene cijevi polumjera $0,3 \, \text{mm}$. Kut kvašenja za živu iznosi $130^\circ$, dok za vodu iznosi $0^\circ$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>

#### Zadano
| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $\sigma_{Hg}, \sigma_v$ | $0,47; 0,0662 \, \text{N/m}$ |
| $R_c$ | $0,0003 \, \text{m}$ |
| $\theta_{Hg}, \theta_v$ | $130^\circ, 0^\circ$ |
| $\rho_{Hg}, \rho_v$ | $13480; 983,7 \, \text{kg/m}^3$ |

</div>
<div>

#### Odrediti
- $h_v, h_{Hg} = ?$

</div>
</div>

**Rješenje:**

- **Voda:** $h_v = \frac{2 \cdot \sigma \cdot \cos \theta}{\rho \cdot g \cdot R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,0662 \cdot \cos 0^\circ}{983,7 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0003} = \mathbf{45,7 \, \text{mm}}$
- **Živa:** $h_{Hg} = \frac{2 \cdot \sigma \cdot \cos \theta}{\rho \cdot g \cdot R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,47 \cdot \cos 130^\circ}{13480 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0003} = \mathbf{-15,2 \, \text{mm}}$ (kapilarna depresija)

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 12: Usporedna kapilarnost -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z12-vdual-fixed" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <style>
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .capillary-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 20px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .capillary-controls { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .capillary-display { display: block; background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; overflow: hidden; height: 400px; position: relative; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .capillary-label { position: absolute; top: 12px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.8rem; width: 50%; text-align: center; z-index: 10; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .metric-card { background: #0f172a; color: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; }
    </style>

    <div class="capillary-grid">
        <div class="capillary-controls">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:10px;">Polumjer kapilare (R): <span id="r-val-z12-dual" style="color:#2563eb;">0.30</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="r-slider-z12-dual" min="0.1" max="1.5" step="0.05" value="0.3" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap:15px; margin-top:15px;">
                <div class="metric-card">
                    <div style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.8;">Voda (uspon)</div>
                    <div style="font-size:1.2rem; font-weight:bold; color:#93c5fd;"><span id="hv-res-z12">45.7</span> mm</div>
                </div>
                <div class="metric-card">
                    <div style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.8;">Živa (depresija)</div>
                    <div style="font-size:1.2rem; font-weight:bold; color:#f87171;"><span id="hhg-res-z12">-15.2</span> mm</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="capillary-display">
            <span class="capillary-label" style="left:0; color:#2563eb;">Voda (θ = 0°)</span>
            <span class="capillary-label" style="right:0; color:#475569;">Živa (θ = 130°)</span>
            <canvas id="canvas-z12-dual" width="800" height="400" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z12-dual');
        if(!canvas) return;
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const rSl = document.getElementById('r-slider-z12-dual');

        function draw() {
            const r_mm = parseFloat(rSl.value), R = r_mm / 1000, g = 9.81;
            const hv = (2 * 0.0662 * Math.cos(0)) / (983.7 * g * R);
            const hhg = (2 * 0.47 * Math.cos(130 * Math.PI / 180)) / (13480 * g * R);

            document.getElementById('r-val-z12-dual').textContent = r_mm.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('hv-res-z12').textContent = (hv * 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('hhg-res-z12').textContent = (hhg * 1000).toFixed(1);

            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const w = canvas.width, h_can = canvas.height, midX = w / 2, baseY = 250, px_per_m = 2000;

            const drawSection = (color, h_val, startX, isWater) => {
                const centerX = startX + w/4, tubeW = r_mm * 50, h_px = h_val * px_per_m;
                ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.globalAlpha = 0.1;
                ctx.fillRect(startX + 20, baseY, w/2 - 40, h_can - baseY);
                ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
                ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(centerX - tubeW/2, 40); ctx.lineTo(centerX - tubeW/2, h_can);
                ctx.moveTo(centerX + tubeW/2, 40); ctx.lineTo(centerX + tubeW/2, h_can); ctx.stroke();
                ctx.fillStyle = color;
                if (isWater) ctx.fillRect(centerX - tubeW/2 + 1, baseY - h_px, tubeW - 2, h_can - (baseY - h_px));
                else {
                    ctx.fillStyle = "#fff"; ctx.fillRect(centerX - tubeW/2 + 1, baseY, tubeW - 2, Math.abs(h_px));
                    ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.fillRect(centerX - tubeW/2 + 1, baseY - h_px, tubeW - 2, h_can - (baseY - h_px));
                }
            };
            drawSection("#2563eb", hv, 0, true);
            drawSection("#64748b", hhg, midX, false);
            requestAnimationFrame(draw);
        }
        rSl.oninput = draw; draw();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Voda se uspinje u kapilari zbog jače adhezije (privlačenje staklu), dok se živa spušta (depresija) zbog jače kohezije (privlačenje samoj sebi).
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z13 — Young-Laplaceov zakon {.unnumbered}

Kuglolika kap vode temperature $25 \, \text{°C}$ u dodiru sa zrakom ima promjer $0,5 \, \text{mm}$. Tlak unutar kapi veći je od atmosferskog tlaka za $565 \, \text{Pa}$. Potrebno je odrediti vrijednost površinske napetosti.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>

#### Zadano
| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $\Delta p$ | $565 \, \text{Pa}$ |
| $D_k$ | $0,0005 \, \text{m}$ |

</div>
<div>

#### Odrediti
- $\sigma = ?$

</div>
</div>

**Rješenje:**

$$\Delta p = \frac{4\sigma}{D} \implies \sigma = \frac{\Delta p \cdot D}{4} = \frac{565 \cdot 0,0005}{4} = \mathbf{0,0706 \, \text{N/m}}$$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 13: Young-Laplace -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z13-advanced" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <style>
        #widget-z13-advanced .yl-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 800px) { #widget-z13-advanced .yl-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-z13-advanced .yl-controls { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .yl-visual { background: #0f172a; border-radius: 12px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; height: 300px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .metric-badge { background: #0f172a; color: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; }
    </style>

    <div class="yl-grid">
        <div class="yl-controls">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px;">Promjer (D): <span id="yl-val-d" style="color:#2563eb;">0.50</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="yl-slider-d" min="0.1" max="3.0" step="0.05" value="0.5" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:20px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px;">Površinska napetost (σ): <span id="yl-val-sig" style="color:#2563eb;">0.073</span> N/m</label>
                <input type="range" id="yl-slider-sig" min="0.010" max="0.100" step="0.001" value="0.073" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="metric-badge">
                <div style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.8;">Unutarnji nadtlak (Δp)</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:bold; color:#93c5fd;"><span id="yl-res-dp">584</span> Pa</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="yl-visual">
            <canvas id="canvas-yl" width="400" height="300" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-yl'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slD = document.getElementById('yl-slider-d'), slSig = document.getElementById('yl-slider-sig');
        function update() {
            const D_mm = parseFloat(slD.value), sig = parseFloat(slSig.value);
            const dp = (4 * sig) / (D_mm / 1000);
            document.getElementById('yl-val-d').textContent = D_mm.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('yl-val-sig').textContent = sig.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('yl-res-dp').textContent = Math.round(dp);
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const r_px = D_mm * 50;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(200, 150, r_px, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        }
        slD.oninput = slSig.oninput = update; update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Što je promjer kapi manji, to je zakrivljenost veća, a površinska napetost "jače" stišće unutrašnjost, uzrokujući veći unutarnji nadtlak.
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z14 — Sila na staklenu cijev {.unnumbered}

Staklena cijev uronjena je u živu kao što je prikazano na slici. Temperatura iznosi $20 \, \text{°C}$. Potrebno je odrediti silu na staklenu cijev uslijed utjecaja površinske napetosti.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>

#### Zadano
| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $\sigma_{Hg}$ | $0,514 \, \text{N/m}$ |
| $d_o, d_i$ | $35; 25 \, \text{mm}$ |
| $\theta_{Hg}$ | $50^\circ$ (vidljivo) |

</div>
<div>

#### Odrediti
- $F_{\sigma, s} = ?$

</div>
</div>

**Rješenje:**

$$F_\sigma = \sigma \cdot \pi \cdot (d_o + d_i) \cdot \cos(50^\circ) = 0,514 \cdot \pi \cdot (0,035 + 0,025) \cdot 0,642 = \mathbf{0,0623 \, \text{N}}$$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 14: Sila na cijevi -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z14-advanced" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <style>
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { #widget-z14-advanced .z14-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-controls { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-visual { background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 300px; }
    </style>
    <div class="z14-grid">
        <div class="z14-controls">
            <label style="display:block; font-weight:600;">Vanjski promjer (d₀): <span id="z14-val-do">35</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z14-slider-do" min="30" max="60" value="35" style="width:100%;">
            <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-top:15px;">Kut (θ): <span id="z14-val-theta">50</span>°</label>
            <input type="range" id="z14-slider-theta" min="0" max="180" value="50" style="width:100%;">
            <div style="background:#0f172a; color:white; padding:12px; border-radius:8px; margin-top:20px; text-align:center;">
                <div style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.8;">Sila (Fz)</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:bold; color:#93c5fd;"><span id="z14-res-fz">0.0623</span> N</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="z14-visual">
            <canvas id="canvas-z14-v2" width="500" height="300" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z14-v2'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slDo = document.getElementById('z14-slider-do'), slTh = document.getElementById('z14-slider-theta');
        function update() {
            const do_mm = parseFloat(slDo.value), th_deg = parseFloat(slTh.value);
            const L = Math.PI * (do_mm + 25) / 1000, Fz = 0.514 * L * Math.cos(th_deg * Math.PI / 180);
            document.getElementById('z14-val-do').textContent = do_mm;
            document.getElementById('z14-val-theta').textContent = th_deg;
            document.getElementById('z14-res-fz').textContent = Math.abs(Fz).toFixed(4);
            ctx.clearRect(0,0,500,300); ctx.fillStyle="#475569"; ctx.fillRect(200, 50, 100, 200);
            ctx.fillStyle="#94a3b8"; ctx.fillRect(0, 250, 500, 50);
        }
        slDo.oninput = slTh.oninput = update; update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Sila površinske napetosti djeluje po cijelom perimetru dodira (unutarnjem i vanjskom bridu cijevi). Ukupna vertikalna komponenta ovisi o kosinusu kuta kvašenja.
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z15 — Plutajuća kuglica {.unnumbered}

Potrebno je odrediti maksimalan promjer čelične i aluminijske kuglice koje mogu plutati na vodi zbog utjecaja površinske napetosti, pri čemu temperatura vode iznosi $20 \, \text{°C}$. Gustoća čelika iznosi $7800 \, \text{kg/m³}$, dok je gustoća aluminija $2700 \, \text{kg/m³}$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>

#### Zadano
| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $\rho_c, \rho_{Al}$ | $7800; 2700 \, \text{kg/m}^3$ |
| $\sigma_v$ | $0,073 \, \text{N/m}$ |

</div>
<div>

#### Odrediti
- $d_{max, c}, d_{max, Al} = ?$

</div>
</div>

**Rješenje:**

$$D_{max} = \sqrt{\frac{6\sigma}{\rho g}}$$

- **Čelik:** $D = \sqrt{\frac{6 \cdot 0,073}{7800 \cdot 9,81}} = \mathbf{2,4 \, \text{mm}}$
- **Aluminij:** $D = \sqrt{\frac{6 \cdot 0,073}{2700 \cdot 9,81}} = \mathbf{4,1 \, \text{mm}}$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 15: Plutajuća kuglica -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z15-vfinal" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap:20px;">
        <div class="controls-panel" style="background:#fff; padding:15px; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:5px;">Promjer d: <span id="d-val-z15">2.0</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="d-slider-z15" min="0.5" max="6.0" step="0.1" value="2.0" style="width:100%;">
            <label style="display:block; margin-top:15px; font-weight:600;">Materijal:</label>
            <select id="mat-select-z15" style="width:100%; padding:8px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #cbd5e0;"><option value="7800">Čelik</option><option value="2700" selected>Aluminij</option></select>
            <div id="status-z15" style="margin-top:20px; text-align:center; font-weight:bold; padding:10px; border-radius:8px;">PLUTA</div>
        </div>
        <div class="visual-panel"><canvas id="canvas-z15-vfinal" width="500" height="250" style="width:100%; background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:12px;"></canvas></div>
    </div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z15-vfinal'), ctx_z15 = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const dS = document.getElementById('d-slider-z15'), mS = document.getElementById('mat-select-z15');
        function draw_z15() {
            const d_mm = parseFloat(dS.value), rho = parseFloat(mS.value), d = d_mm / 1000, sigma = 0.073, g = 9.81;
            const Fg = rho * (4/3) * Math.PI * Math.pow(d/2, 3) * g, Fs = Math.PI * d * sigma, isF = Fg <= Fs;
            document.getElementById('d-val-z15').textContent = d_mm.toFixed(1);
            const sEl = document.getElementById('status-z15'); sEl.textContent = isF ? "PLUTA ✓" : "TONE ✗";
            sEl.style.background = isF ? "#f0fff4" : "#fff5f5"; sEl.style.color = isF ? "#16a34a" : "#dc2626";
            ctx_z15.clearRect(0,0,500,250); const cx = 250, cy = 125, r = d_mm * 15;
            ctx_z15.strokeStyle = "#2563eb"; ctx_z15.lineWidth = 2; ctx_z15.beginPath();
            if(isF) { const dip = (Fg/Fs)*r*0.6; ctx_z15.moveTo(0,cy); ctx_z15.quadraticCurveTo(cx,cy+dip*2,500,cy); ctx_z15.stroke(); ctx_z15.fillStyle="#64748b"; ctx_z15.beginPath(); ctx_z15.arc(cx, cy+dip-r*0.5, r, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx_z15.fill(); }
            else { ctx_z15.moveTo(0,cy); ctx_z15.lineTo(500,cy); ctx_z15.stroke(); ctx_z15.fillStyle="#64748b"; ctx_z15.beginPath(); ctx_z15.arc(cx, 200, r, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx_z15.fill(); }
        }
        dS.oninput = mS.onchange = draw_z15; draw_z15();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Kuglica pluta iako je gušća od vode jer sila površinske napetosti (koja djeluje duž opsega) nadjačava njezinu težinu.
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z16 — Vizualizacija kapilarne greške {.unnumbered}

Staklena cijev na slici koristi se za mjerenje pretlaka u spremniku vode $p_1$. Staklena cijev je promjera $1 \, \text{mm}$, temperatura vode iznosi $30 \, \text{°C}$. Potrebno je odrediti otklon očitanja zbog utjecaja površinske napetosti, te odrediti pravu visinu vode u staklenoj cijevi.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>

#### Zadano
| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $d_c$ | $1 \, \text{mm}$ |
| $\sigma_v, \rho_v$ | $0,0712 \, \text{N/m}; 996 \, \text{kg/m}^3$ |
| $H$ | $0,17 \, \text{m}$ |

</div>
<div>

#### Odrediti
- $h = ?$
- $H_0 = ?$

</div>
</div>

**Rješenje:**

1. **Kapilarni uspon:** $h = \frac{2\sigma}{\rho g R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,0712}{996 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0005} = \mathbf{29 \, \text{mm}}$
2. **Prava visina:** $H_o = 170 - 29 = \mathbf{141 \, \text{mm}}$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 16: Vizualizacija kapilarne greške -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z16-advanced" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <style>
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.3fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { #widget-z16-advanced .z16-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-controls { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-visual { background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; position: relative; overflow: hidden; height: 350px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .result-panel { background: #0f172a; color: white; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; margin-top: 15px; }
    </style>

    <div class="z16-grid">
        <div class="z16-controls">
            <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px;">Promjer (d_c): <span id="z16-val-dc" style="color:#2563eb;">1.0</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z16-slider-dc" min="0.5" max="10.0" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width:100%;">
            <div class="result-panel">
                <div style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.8;">GREŠKA (h)</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:bold; color:#93c5fd;"><span id="z16-res-h">29.8</span> mm</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="z16-visual">
            <canvas id="canvas-z16-v2" width="500" height="350" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z16-v2'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slDc = document.getElementById('z16-slider-dc');
        function update() {
            const dc_mm = parseFloat(slDc.value), h_error = (4 * 0.073) / (1000 * 9.81 * dc_mm / 1000);
            document.getElementById('z16-val-dc').textContent = dc_mm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z16-res-h').textContent = (h_error * 1000).toFixed(1);
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.fillRect(240, 300 - h_error*500, 20, h_error*500);
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.strokeRect(240, 50, 20, 250);
        }
        slDc.oninput = update; update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Pri mjerenju tlaka uskim cijevima (manometri), tekućina se uspinje više od stvarne razine. Tu grešku moramo oduzeti od očitanja kako bismo dobili pravi tlak.
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z17 — Kapilarni porast kerozina {.unnumbered}

Cijev promjera $0,75 \, \text{mm}$ uronjena je u kerozin temperature $20 \, \text{°C}$. Kut kvašenja između kerozina i staklene površine iznosi $26^\circ$. Potrebno je odrediti kapilarni porast kerozina u cijevi. Potrebno je odrediti promjer cijevi za koju će pogreška u očitanju zbog površinske napetosti iznositi $1 \, \text{mm}$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>

#### Zadano
| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $d_c, \theta$ | $0,75 \, \text{mm}; 26^\circ$ |
| $\sigma_k, \rho_k$ | $0,028 \, \text{N/m}; 820 \, \text{kg/m}^3$ |
| $\Delta h$ | $1 \, \text{mm}$ |

</div>
<div>

#### Odrediti
- $h = ?$
- $d_c$ za grešku $1 \, \text{mm} = ?$

</div>
</div>

**Rješenje:**

$$h = \frac{2 \sigma \cos\theta}{\rho g R_c} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,028 \cdot \cos 26^\circ}{820 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,000375} = \mathbf{16,7 \, \text{mm}}$$

***

### Zadatak Z18 — Transport vode u biljkama {.unnumbered}

Voda sa otopljenim hranjivim tvarima prenosi se u gornje dijelove biljke pomoću sitnih cjevčica djelomično kao posljedica kapilarnog efekta. Potrebno je odrediti do koje visine će se podignuti otopina ukoliko je promjer cjevčica $0,005 \, \text{mm}$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>

#### Zadano
| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $d_c$ | $0,000005 \, \text{m}$ |
| $\sigma, \theta$ | $0,073 \, \text{N/m}; 15^\circ$ |
| $\rho$ | $998,2 \, \text{kg/m}^3$ |

</div>
<div>

#### Odrediti
- $h = ?$

</div>
</div>

**Rješenje:**

$$h = \frac{2 \cdot 0,073 \cdot \cos 15^\circ}{998,2 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0000025} = \mathbf{5,76 \, \text{m}}$$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 18: Kapilarnost u ksilemu -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z18-advanced" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <style>
        #widget-z18-advanced .tree-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { #widget-z18-advanced .tree-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-z18-advanced .tree-controls { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .tree-visual { background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 350px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    </style>

    <div class="tree-grid">
        <div class="tree-controls">
            <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px;">Promjer ksilema (d): <span id="z18-val-d" style="color:#2563eb;">20</span> μm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z18-slider-d" min="5" max="100" step="1" value="20" style="width:100%;">
            <div style="background:#0f172a; color:white; padding:12px; border-radius:8px; margin-top:20px; text-align:center;">
                <div style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.8;">Maksimalni uspon</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:bold; color:#93c5fd;"><span id="z18-res-maxh">1.5</span> m</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tree-visual">
            <canvas id="canvas-z18-tree" width="400" height="350" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z18-tree'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slD = document.getElementById('z18-slider-d');
        function update() {
            const d_um = parseFloat(slD.value), d = d_um / 1_000_000;
            const h_cap = (4 * 0.073 * Math.cos(15 * Math.PI / 180)) / (1000 * 9.81 * d);
            document.getElementById('z18-val-d').textContent = d_um;
            document.getElementById('z18-res-maxh').textContent = h_cap.toFixed(2);
            ctx.clearRect(0,0,400,350);
            ctx.fillStyle = "#451a03"; ctx.fillRect(190, 350 - Math.min(300, h_cap*10), 20, Math.min(300, h_cap*10));
        }
        slD.oninput = update; update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Kapilarnost je dovoljna za podizanje vode u niskom bilju. Za visoka stabla (npr. sekvoje), priroda koristi dodatni mehanizam transpiracijskog vlaka.
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z19 — Tlak u višeslojnom spremniku {.unnumbered}

Sustav na slici nalazi se na temperaturi $20^\circ\text{C}$. Ukoliko atmosferski tlak iznosi $101,03 \text{ kPa}$, a apsolutni tlak na dnu spremnika iznosi $217,7 \text{ kPa}$, potrebno je odrediti relativnu gustoću maslinovog ulja. Relativna gustoća ulja SAE 30 za zadanu temperaturu iznosi $0,89$, dok relativna gustoća žive za zadanu temperaturu iznosi $13,6$.

::: {.zadano-grid}
| Zadano | |
|:---|:---|
| $t_1 = 20^\circ\text{C}$ | $h_{SAE} = 1,5 \text{ m}$ |
| $p_{atm} = 101030 \text{ Pa}$ | $h_u = 2,9 \text{ m}$ |
| $p_d = 217700 \text{ Pa}$ | $h_v = 2,5 \text{ m}$ |
| $\bar{\rho}_{SAE30} = 0,89$ | $h_{Hg} = 0,4 \text{ m}$ |
| $\bar{\rho}_{Hg} = 13,6$ | |

| Odrediti |
|:---|
| $\bar{\rho}_{u} = ?$ |
:::

**Rješenje:**

Postavljanjem jednadžbe hidrostatskog tlaka od površine do dna:
$$p_{dno} = p_{atm} + \rho_v g (\bar{\rho}_{SAE}h_{SAE} + \bar{\rho}_u h_u + 1 \cdot h_v + \bar{\rho}_{Hg}h_{Hg})$$

Uvrštavanjem poznatih vrijednosti:
$$217700 = 101030 + 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot (0,89 \cdot 1,5 + \bar{\rho}_u \cdot 2,9 + 1 \cdot 2,5 + 13,6 \cdot 0,4)$$

Rješavanjem po $\bar{\rho}_u$ dobivamo:
$$\mathbf{\bar{\rho}_u = 0,911}$$

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 19: Napredna analiza višeslojnog statičkog tlaka -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z19-advanced" style="margin: 2rem 0; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background-color: #f8fafc;">
    <style>
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { #widget-z19-advanced .z19-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-controls { background: #ffffff; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-visual-container { display: flex; gap: 15px; background: #fff; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 450px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .pressure-gauge { background: #0f172a; color: white; padding: 15px; margin-top: 15px; text-align: center; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .fluid-layer-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 5px; }
    </style>

    <div style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:20px; border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0; padding-bottom: 10px;">
        <h4 style="margin:0; color:#0f172a;">🛢️ Tlak u višeslojnom spremniku</h4>
    </div>

    <div class="z19-grid">
        <div class="z19-controls">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label class="fluid-layer-label">Rel. gustoća maslinovog ulja (sᵤ): <span id="z19-val-ru">0.91</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="z19-slider-ru" min="0.80" max="1.10" step="0.01" value="0.91" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:20px;">
                <label class="fluid-layer-label">Visina maslinovog ulja (hᵤ): <span id="z19-val-hu">2.9</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z19-slider-hu" min="1.0" max="4.0" step="0.1" value="2.9" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:20px; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; font-size:0.8rem; color:#e53e3e; margin-bottom:8px;">Pomakni sondu (Dubina z): <span id="z19-val-probe">0.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z19-slider-probe" min="0" max="6.2" step="0.1" value="0" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="pressure-gauge">
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem; opacity:0.8; text-transform:uppercase;">Apsolutni tlak u točki (p)</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.8rem; font-weight:900; color:#38bdf8;"><span id="z19-res-p">101.3</span> kPa</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#94a3b8; margin-top:5px;">UKLJUČUJE p_atm = 101.03 kPa</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="z19-visual-container">
            <div style="flex: 1; position: relative;">
                <canvas id="canvas-z19-tank" width="200" height="420" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div style="flex: 1.5; position: relative;">
                <canvas id="canvas-z19-graph" width="300" height="420" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cTank = document.getElementById('canvas-z19-tank');
        const cGraph = document.getElementById('canvas-z19-graph');
        const ctxT = cTank.getContext('2d');
        const ctxG = cGraph.getContext('2d');
        
        const slRu = document.getElementById('z19-slider-ru');
        const slHu = document.getElementById('z19-slider-hu');
        const slPr = document.getElementById('z19-slider-probe');

        function update() {
            const ru = parseFloat(slRu.value);
            const hu = parseFloat(slHu.value);
            
            const hsae = 1.5; const hv = 2.5; const hhg = 0.4;
            const rsae = 0.89; const rv = 1.0; const rhg = 13.6;
            const patm = 101.03; const g = 9.81;

            const layers = [
                { name: "SAE 30", h: hsae, r: rsae, color: "#f97316" },
                { name: "Maslinovo", h: hu, r: ru, color: "#eab308" },
                { name: "Voda", h: hv, r: rv, color: "#3b82f6" },
                { name: "Živa", h: hhg, r: rhg, color: "#64748b" }
            ];

            const totalH = layers.reduce((sum, l) => sum + l.h, 0);
            slPr.max = totalH.toFixed(1);
            const probeZ = parseFloat(slPr.value);

            let currentP = patm;
            let currentZ = 0;
            for(let layer of layers) {
                if(probeZ > currentZ) {
                    const depthInLayer = Math.min(layer.h, probeZ - currentZ);
                    currentP += (layer.r * 1000 * g * depthInLayer) / 1000;
                    currentZ += layer.h;
                }
            }

            document.getElementById('z19-val-ru').textContent = ru.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z19-val-hu').textContent = hu.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z19-val-probe').textContent = probeZ.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z19-res-p').textContent = currentP.toFixed(2);

            draw(layers, probeZ, currentP, totalH);
        }

        function draw(layers, probeZ, probeP, totalH) {
            const scaleY = 400 / totalH;
            ctxT.clearRect(0,0,200,420);
            let y = 10;
            layers.forEach(l => {
                const layerH = l.h * scaleY;
                ctxT.fillStyle = l.color;
                ctxT.globalAlpha = 0.8;
                ctxT.fillRect(20, y, 160, layerH);
                ctxT.globalAlpha = 1.0;
                ctxT.fillStyle = "#fff"; ctxT.font = "bold 10px Inter, sans-serif";
                ctxT.fillText(l.name, 30, y + layerH/2 + 4);
                y += layerH;
            });
            ctxT.strokeStyle = "#0f172a"; ctxT.lineWidth = 2;
            ctxT.strokeRect(20, 10, 160, totalH * scaleY);

            const py = 10 + probeZ * scaleY;
            ctxT.strokeStyle = "#ef4444"; ctxT.lineWidth = 2;
            ctxT.beginPath(); ctxT.moveTo(10, py); ctxT.lineTo(190, py); ctxT.stroke();

            ctxG.clearRect(0,0,300,420);
            const graphPad = 40;
            const maxP = 250;
            const scaleX = (300 - graphPad*2) / (maxP - 100);

            ctxG.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctxG.lineWidth = 1;
            ctxG.beginPath(); ctxG.moveTo(graphPad, 10); ctxG.lineTo(graphPad, 410); ctxG.lineTo(280, 410); ctxG.stroke();
            
            let curZ = 0; let curP = 101.03;
            ctxG.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctxG.lineWidth = 3;
            ctxG.beginPath();
            ctxG.moveTo(graphPad + (curP - 101.03) * scaleX, 10);
            layers.forEach(l => {
                curZ += l.h;
                curP += (l.r * 1000 * 9.81 * l.h) / 1000;
                ctxG.lineTo(graphPad + (curP - 101.03) * scaleX, 10 + curZ * scaleY);
            });
            ctxG.stroke();

            const gx = graphPad + (probeP - 101.03) * scaleX;
            ctxG.fillStyle = "#ef4444"; ctxG.beginPath(); ctxG.arc(gx, py, 5, 0, Math.PI*2); ctxG.fill();
        }
        slRu.oninput = slHu.oninput = slPr.oninput = update;
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Hidrostatski tlak u višeslojnim sustavima računa se kao suma doprinosa svakog pojedinog sloja. Nagib linije na grafu p(z) direktno je proporcionalan gustoći fluida u tom sloju.
</div>

```

***

### Zadatak Z20 — Intravenozna infuzija {.unnumbered}

Intravenozna infuzija obično se vrši gravitacijski ovješenjem spremnika tekućine na dovoljnoj visini koja će nadvladati tlak krvi unutar krvnih žila te potisnuti fluid unutar tijela. Gustoća tekućine iznosi $\rho_i = 1020 \, \text{kg/m}^3$.

::: {.zadano-grid}
| Zadano | |
|:---|:---|
| $h_{i1} = 1,2 \text{ m}$ | $\rho_i = 1020 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |
| $p_{k2} = 20000 \text{ Pa}$ | $p_{mmHg} = 180 \text{ mmHg}$ |

| Odrediti |
|:---|
| $p_{k1} = ?, h_{i2} = ?, h_{i3} = ?$ |
:::

**Rješenje:**

a) Pretlak krvi kada je hidrostatski tlak izjednačen s visinom krvi ($h_{i1} = 1,2 \text{ m}$):
$$p_{k1} = \rho_i g h_{i1} = 1020 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 1,2 = \mathbf{12007,4 \text{ Pa}} \approx \mathbf{12 \text{ kPa}}$$

b) Visina ovješenja potrebna za pretlak $p_{k2} = 20000 \text{ Pa}$:
$$h_{i2} = \frac{p_{k2}}{\rho_i g} = \frac{20000}{1020 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{2,0 \text{ m}}$$

c) Visina ovješenja za tlak od $180 \text{ mmHg}$:
$$180 \text{ mmHg} = 180 \cdot 133,322 = 23998 \text{ Pa} \approx 24 \text{ kPa}$$
$$h_{i3} = \frac{24000}{1020 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{2,4 \text{ m}}$$

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 20: Napredni simulator IV infuzije -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z20-advanced" style="margin: 2rem 0; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background-color: #f8fafc;">
    <style>
        #widget-z20-advanced .iv-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { #widget-z20-advanced .iv-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-z20-advanced .iv-controls { background: #ffffff; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .iv-visual-box { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; position: relative; overflow: hidden; height: 450px; display: flex; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .pressure-compare { width: 100px; border-right: 1px solid #edf2f7; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; padding: 20px 10px; gap: 10px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .p-bar { width: 30px; transition: height 0.3s; position: relative; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .p-bar-label { position: absolute; top: -20px; left: 0; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap; color: #64748b; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .iv-main-view { flex: 1; position: relative; background: #fcfcfc; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .status-pill { padding: 10px; text-align: center; font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-top: 15px; border: 1px solid transparent; }
    </style>

    <div style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:20px; border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0; padding-bottom: 10px;">
        <h4 style="margin:0; color:#0f172a;">💉 Simulator: Hidrostatski balans IV infuzije</h4>
    </div>

    <div class="iv-grid">
        <div class="iv-controls">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:8px;">Visina vrećice (h): <span id="z20-val-h">1.20</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z20-slider-h" min="0.2" max="3.0" step="0.05" value="1.2" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:20px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:8px;">Sistolički tlak (pₖᵥ): <span id="z20-val-bp">120</span> mmHg</label>
                <input type="range" id="z20-slider-bp" min="60" max="220" step="5" value="120" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="margin-top:20px; padding:15px; background:#f1f5f9; font-size:0.85rem;">
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:5px;">
                    <span>Tlak infuzije:</span> <b id="z20-calc-pi" style="color:#2563eb;">12.0 kPa</b>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between;">
                    <span>Tlak krvi:</span> <b id="z20-calc-pb" style="color:#dc2626;">16.0 kPa</b>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div id="z20-status" class="status-pill">PROVJERAVAM...</div>
        </div>

        <div class="iv-visual-box">
            <div class="pressure-compare">
                <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-end; height:100%; gap:15px; border-bottom:2px solid #0f172a;">
                    <div id="z20-bar-inf" class="p-bar" style="background:#3b82f6; height:50%;">
                        <span class="p-bar-label">p_inf</span>
                    </div>
                    <div id="z20-bar-bld" class="p-bar" style="background:#ef4444; height:70%;">
                        <span class="p-bar-label">p_krv</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="iv-main-view">
                <canvas id="canvas-z20-iv" width="400" height="450" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z20-iv');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slH = document.getElementById('z20-slider-h');
        const slBp = document.getElementById('z20-slider-bp');
        
        const bInf = document.getElementById('z20-bar-inf');
        const bBld = document.getElementById('z20-bar-bld');
        const stEl = document.getElementById('z20-status');

        let particles = Array.from({length: 8}, () => ({ y: Math.random() * 300, offset: Math.random() * 40 }));

        function update() {
            const h = parseFloat(slH.value);
            const bp_mmhg = parseFloat(slBp.value);
            const rho = 1020, g = 9.81;

            const p_inf = (rho * g * h) / 1000;
            const p_bld = (bp_mmhg * 133.322) / 1000;
            
            document.getElementById('z20-val-h').textContent = h.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z20-val-bp').textContent = bp_mmhg;
            document.getElementById('z20-calc-pi').textContent = p_inf.toFixed(1) + " kPa";
            document.getElementById('z20-calc-pb').textContent = p_bld.toFixed(1) + " kPa";

            bInf.style.height = Math.min(100, (p_inf / 35 * 100)) + "%";
            bBld.style.height = Math.min(100, (p_bld / 35 * 100)) + "%";

            const diff = p_inf - p_bld;
            if(diff > 2) {
                stEl.textContent = "SIGURAN PROTOK ✓";
                stEl.style.backgroundColor = "#dcfce7"; stEl.style.color = "#166534"; stEl.style.borderColor = "#86efac";
            } else if (diff > 0) {
                stEl.textContent = "KRITIČNO NIZAK TLAK ⚠️";
                stEl.style.backgroundColor = "#fef3c7"; stEl.style.color = "#92400e"; stEl.style.borderColor = "#fde68a";
            } else {
                stEl.textContent = "OPASNOST: POVRAT KRVI! ✗";
                stEl.style.backgroundColor = "#fee2e2"; stEl.style.color = "#991b1b"; stEl.style.borderColor = "#fecaca";
            }

            draw(h, diff > 0);
        }

        function draw(h, isFlowing) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = canvas.width / 2;
            const baseY = 380;
            const h_px = h * 100;

            ctx.fillStyle = "#fde68a";
            ctx.fillRect(50, baseY, 300, 40);
            
            ctx.strokeStyle = isFlowing ? "#3b82f6" : "#ef4444";
            ctx.lineWidth = 4;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(50, baseY + 20); ctx.lineTo(350, baseY + 20);
            ctx.stroke();

            const bagY = baseY - h_px;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#f8fafc"; ctx.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.rect(cx - 30, bagY - 80, 60, 80); ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke();
            
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)";
            ctx.fillRect(cx - 28, bagY - 40, 56, 38);

            ctx.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx, bagY); ctx.lineTo(cx, baseY + 20); ctx.stroke();

            const time = Date.now() * 0.002;
            if(isFlowing) {
                ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6";
                particles.forEach((p, i) => {
                    const py = bagY + ((i * 40 + time * 50) % (h_px + 20));
                    if(py < baseY + 20) {
                        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, py, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
                    }
                });
            } else {
                ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
                const bloodRise = Math.min(40, (Date.now() % 2000) / 10);
                ctx.fillRect(cx - 2, baseY + 20 - bloodRise, 4, bloodRise);
            }
        }

        function anim() { update(); requestAnimationFrame(anim); }
        slH.oninput = slBp.oninput = update;
        anim();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Da bi infuzija tekla u venu, hidrostatski tlak stupca tekućine mora biti veći od krvnog tlaka u toj točki. U suprotnom, krv će krenuti prema gore u cjevčicu infuzije.
</div>

```

***

### Zadatak Z21 — Utjecaj težine zraka {.unnumbered}

Zatvoreni spremnik sa slike temperature je $20^\circ\text{C}$. Apsolutni tlak u točki A iznosi $98 \text{ kPa}$. Gustoća zraka pri $20^\circ\text{C}$ iznosi $\rho_z = 1,2041 \text{ kg/m}^3$.

::: {.zadano-grid}
| Zadano | |
|:---|:---|
| $p_A = 98000 \text{ Pa}$ | $h_{zA} = 5 \text{ m}, h_{vA} = 3 \text{ m}$ |
| $\rho_{z20} = 1,2041 \text{ kg/m}^3$ | $h_{zB} = 3 \text{ m}, h_{vB} = 5 \text{ m}$ |
| $\rho_{v20} = 998 \text{ kg/m}^3$ | |

| Odrediti |
|:---|
| $p_B = ?, \Delta p_{err} = ?$ |
:::

**Rješenje:**

a) Postavljanjem jednadžbe od A do B preko zraka i vode:
$$p_B = p_A + \rho_z g (h_{zA} - h_{zB}) - \rho_v g (h_{vB} - h_{vA})$$
$$p_B = 98000 + 1,2041 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 - 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 = \mathbf{78443,2 \text{ Pa}}$$

b) Pogreška uzrokovana zanemarivanjem utjecaja specifične težine zraka:
Bez utjecaja zraka: 
$$p_B = p_A - \rho_v g \Delta h_v = 98000 - 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 = 78419,6 \text{ Pa}$$
$$\Delta p_{err} = 78443,2 - 78419,6 = 23,6 \text{ Pa} \approx \mathbf{0,03\%}$$

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 21: Vizualizacija utjecaja težine zraka -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z21-advanced" style="margin: 2rem 0; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background-color: #f8fafc;">
    <style>
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { #widget-z21-advanced .z21-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-controls { background: #ffffff; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-visual-box { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; display: flex; padding: 15px; gap: 15px; height: 400px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .error-card { background: #0f172a; color: white; padding: 15px; margin-top: 15px; text-align: center; border-left: 4px solid #ef4444; }
    </style>

    <div style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:20px; border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0; padding-bottom: 10px;">
        <h4 style="margin:0; color:#0f172a;">☁️ Težina zraka: Zanemariti ili ne?</h4>
    </div>

    <div class="z21-grid">
        <div class="z21-controls">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:8px;">Visina zraka (h_z): <span id="z21-val-hz">5.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z21-slider-hz" min="1" max="100" step="1" value="5" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:20px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:8px;">Visina vode (h_v): <span id="z21-val-hv">5.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z21-slider-hv" min="1" max="20" step="0.5" value="5" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="error-card">
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem; opacity:0.8; text-transform:uppercase;">Pogreška zanemarivanja zraka</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.8rem; font-weight:900; color:#fca5a5;"><span id="z21-res-err">0.024</span> %</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#94a3b8; margin-top:5px;">Doprinos zraka: <b id="z21-res-dpz">59</b> Pa</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="z21-visual-box">
            <div style="flex: 1;">
                <canvas id="canvas-z21-tank" width="150" height="370" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div style="flex: 2;">
                <canvas id="canvas-z21-graph" width="250" height="370" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cTank = document.getElementById('canvas-z21-tank');
        const cGraph = document.getElementById('canvas-z21-graph');
        const ctxT = cTank.getContext('2d');
        const ctxG = cGraph.getContext('2d');
        
        const slHz = document.getElementById('z21-slider-hz');
        const slHv = document.getElementById('z21-slider-hv');

        function update() {
            const hz = parseFloat(slHz.value);
            const hv = parseFloat(slHv.value);
            const pA = 98000;
            const rhoz = 1.204, rhov = 998, g = 9.81;

            const dpz = rhoz * g * hz;
            const dpv = rhov * g * hv;
            const pB_exact = pA + dpz + dpv;
            const pB_approx = pA + dpv;
            const err = (Math.abs(pB_exact - pB_approx) / pB_exact) * 100;

            document.getElementById('z21-val-hz').textContent = hz.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z21-val-hv').textContent = hv.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z21-res-err').textContent = err.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z21-res-dpz').textContent = Math.round(dpz);

            draw(hz, hv, dpz, dpv, pA);
        }

        function draw(hz, hv, dpz, dpv, pA) {
            const totalH = hz + hv;
            const scaleY = 350 / totalH;
            ctxT.clearRect(0,0,150,370);
            
            ctxT.fillStyle = "#f1f5f9";
            ctxT.fillRect(20, 10, 110, hz * scaleY);
            ctxT.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8"; ctxT.lineWidth = 1;
            ctxT.strokeRect(20, 10, 110, hz * scaleY);
            
            ctxT.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctxT.globalAlpha = 0.6;
            ctxT.fillRect(20, 10 + hz * scaleY, 110, hv * scaleY);
            ctxT.globalAlpha = 1.0;
            ctxT.strokeStyle = "#1e40af"; ctxT.lineWidth = 2;
            ctxT.strokeRect(20, 10 + hz * scaleY, 110, hv * scaleY);

            ctxG.clearRect(0,0,250,370);
            const graphX = 40;
            ctxG.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctxG.beginPath();
            ctxG.moveTo(graphX, 10); ctxG.lineTo(graphX, 360); ctxG.lineTo(240, 360); ctxG.stroke();
            
            const totalDP = dpz + dpv;
            const scaleX = 180 / totalDP;

            ctxG.strokeStyle = "#ef4444"; ctxG.lineWidth = 2;
            ctxG.beginPath(); ctxG.moveTo(graphX, 10); ctxG.lineTo(graphX + dpz * scaleX, 10 + hz * scaleY); ctxG.stroke();

            ctxG.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctxG.lineWidth = 3;
            ctxG.beginPath(); ctxG.moveTo(graphX + dpz * scaleX, 10 + hz * scaleY); ctxG.lineTo(graphX + (dpz + dpv) * scaleX, 10 + (hz + hv) * scaleY); ctxG.stroke();
        }
        slHz.oninput = slHv.oninput = update;
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

<div class="widget-container" id="widget-air-extremes" style="margin: 2rem 0; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #3b82f6; background-color: #eff6ff;">
    <style>
        #widget-air-extremes .extreme-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 700px) { #widget-air-extremes .extreme-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-air-extremes .scenario-card { background: white; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; }
        #widget-air-extremes .weight-box { width: 100%; height: 120px; background: #f8fafc; margin: 15px 0; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
        #widget-air-extremes .air-mass-fill { background: #94a3b8; position: absolute; bottom: 0; width: 100%; transition: height 0.5s; }
    </style>

    <div style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:20px; border-bottom: 2px solid #3b82f6; padding-bottom: 10px;">
        <h4 style="margin:0; color:#1e40af;">🚀 Ekstremi: Kada zrak postaje "težak"?</h4>
    </div>

    <div class="extreme-grid">
        <div class="scenario-card">
            <h5 style="margin:0; color:#1e40af;">🏭 Industrijski tlak</h5>
            <div class="control-group" style="width:100%; margin-top:10px;">
                <label style="font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:bold;">Tlak (p): <span id="air-ex-val-p">1</span> bar</label>
                <input type="range" id="air-ex-slider-p" min="1" max="300" value="1" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="weight-box">
                <div id="air-ex-fill-p" class="air-mass-fill"></div>
                <div style="z-index:1; font-weight:800; color:#0f172a;"><span id="air-ex-mass-p">0.06</span> kg zraka</div>
            </div>
            <p style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#64748b;">Boca komprimiranog zraka (50L)</p>
        </div>

        <div class="scenario-card">
            <h5 style="margin:0; color:#1e40af;">🏔️ Vertikalni razmaci</h5>
            <div class="control-group" style="width:100%; margin-top:10px;">
                <label style="font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:bold;">Visina (ΔH): <span id="air-ex-val-h">0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="air-ex-slider-h" min="0" max="4000" step="100" value="0" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="weight-box">
                <div style="font-size:2rem;">🏗️</div>
                <div style="position:absolute; bottom:10px; font-weight:bold; color:#ef4444; font-size:0.85rem;">Δp = <span id="air-ex-res-dp">0</span> Pa</div>
            </div>
            <p style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#64748b;">Dubina rudnika / Visina nebodera</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const slP = document.getElementById('air-ex-slider-p');
        const slH = document.getElementById('air-ex-slider-h');

        function update() {
            const p = parseFloat(slP.value);
            const density = (p * 100000) / (287 * 293);
            const mass = density * 0.050;
            document.getElementById('air-ex-val-p').textContent = p;
            document.getElementById('air-ex-mass-p').textContent = mass.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('air-ex-fill-p').style.height = Math.min(100, (p/300)*100) + "%";

            const h = parseFloat(slH.value);
            const dp = 1.204 * 9.81 * h;
            document.getElementById('air-ex-val-h').textContent = h;
            document.getElementById('air-ex-res-dp').textContent = Math.round(dp).toLocaleString();
        }
        slP.oninput = slH.oninput = update;
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 U većini strojarskih proračuna težina zraka se zanemaruje jer je voda oko 830 puta gušća. Ipak, kod velikih visinskih razlika (rudnici, neboderi) ili visokih tlakova (spremnici pod tlakom), doprinos zraka postaje mjerljiv.
</div>

```

***

### Zadatak Z22 — Manometar na planini {.unnumbered}

Voda u spremniku predtlačena je zrakom, pri čemu se tlak očitava pomoću višefluidnog manometra. Spremnik se nalazi na planini nadmorske visine $1400 \text{ m}$ pri čemu atmosferski tlak iznosi $85,6 \text{ kPa}$. Potrebno je odrediti pretlak zraka u spremniku $p_{m1}$.

::: {.zadano-grid}
| Zadano | |
|:---|:---|
| $p_{atm} = 85600 \text{ Pa}$ | $h_1 = 0,1 \text{ m}, h_2 = 0,2 \text{ m}, h_3 = 0,46 \text{ m}$ |
| $\rho_v = 1000 \text{ kg/m}^3$ | $\rho_u = 850 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |
| $\rho_{Hg} = 13600 \text{ kg/m}^3$ | |

| Odrediti |
|:---|
| $p_{m1} = ?$ |
:::
