**Rješenje:**

Postavljanjem jednadžbe manometra od točke 1 (zrak) do otvorenog kraja (atmosfera):
$$p_1 + \rho_v g h_1 + \rho_u g h_2 - \rho_{Hg} g h_3 = p_{atm}$$

Pretlak zraka u spremniku ($p_{m1} = p_1 - p_{atm}$):
$$p_{m1} = \rho_{Hg} g h_3 - \rho_u g h_2 - \rho_v g h_1$$
$$p_{m1} = 9,81 \cdot (13600 \cdot 0,46 - 850 \cdot 0,2 - 1000 \cdot 0,1) = \mathbf{58723 \text{ Pa}} \approx \mathbf{58,7 \text{ kPa}}$$

Apsolutni tlak u posudi iznosi:
$$p_1 = p_{m1} + p_{atm} = 58723 + 85600 = \mathbf{144,3 \text{ kPa}}$$

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 22: Napredna analiza manometra na visini -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z22-advanced" style="margin: 2rem 0; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background-color: #f8fafc;">
    <style>
        #widget-z22-advanced .mountain-env { position: relative; height: 150px; margin-bottom: 20px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #f1f5f9; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { #widget-z22-advanced .z22-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-controls { background: #ffffff; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .manometer-visual { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; position: relative; height: 400px; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .result-pill { background: #0f172a; color: white; padding: 12px; text-align: center; flex: 1; }
    </style>

    <div style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:20px; border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0; padding-bottom: 10px;">
        <h4 style="margin:0; color:#0f172a;">🏔️ Višefluidni manometar na visini</h4>
    </div>

    <div id="z22-env" class="mountain-env">
        <div style="position:absolute; top:15px; left:15px; font-weight:bold; color:#1e40af; font-size:0.8rem;">
            ALTI-METAR: <span id="z22-disp-alt">0</span> m
        </div>
        <div id="z22-clouds" style="position:absolute; top:40px; width:100%; text-align:center; font-size:2rem; opacity:0.3;">☁️ ☁️ ☁️</div>
    </div>

    <div class="z22-grid">
        <div class="z22-controls">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:8px;">Visina (Altituda): <span id="z22-val-alt">1400</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z22-slider-alt" min="0" max="5000" step="100" value="1400" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:20px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:8px;">Visina žive (h₃): <span id="z22-val-h3">460</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z22-slider-h3" min="100" max="800" step="10" value="460" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:20px;">
                <div class="result-pill">
                    <div style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.7;">p_atm (Barometar)</div>
                    <div style="font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:bold; color:#38bdf8;"><span id="z22-res-patm">85.6</span> kPa</div>
                </div>
                <div class="result-pill">
                    <div style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.7;">p_abs (Spremnik)</div>
                    <div style="font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:bold; color:#4ade80;"><span id="z22-res-pabs">144.3</span> kPa</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="manometer-visual">
            <canvas id="canvas-z22-v2" width="500" height="400" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z22-v2');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slAlt = document.getElementById('z22-slider-alt');
        const slH3 = document.getElementById('z22-slider-h3');
        const env = document.getElementById('z22-env');
        const clouds = document.getElementById('z22-clouds');

        function update() {
            const alt = parseFloat(slAlt.value);
            const h3_mm = parseFloat(slH3.value);
            const h3 = h3_mm / 1000;
            
            const patm = 101.325 * Math.exp(-alt / 8000);
            const rho1 = 1000, rho2 = 850, rho3 = 13600, g = 9.81;
            const h1 = 0.1, h2 = 0.2;

            const pm1 = (rho3 * g * h3 - rho2 * g * h2 - rho1 * g * h1) / 1000;
            const pabs = patm + pm1;

            document.getElementById('z22-val-alt').textContent = alt;
            document.getElementById('z22-disp-alt').textContent = alt;
            document.getElementById('z22-val-h3').textContent = h3_mm;
            document.getElementById('z22-res-patm').textContent = patm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z22-res-pabs').textContent = pabs.toFixed(1);

            const brightness = Math.max(20, 95 - alt/100);
            env.style.backgroundColor = `hsl(210, 40%, ${brightness}%)`;
            clouds.style.top = (20 + alt/100) + "px";

            draw(h1, h2, h3);
        }

        function draw(h1, h2, h3) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = 150, cy = 200;
            const scale = 200;

            ctx.fillStyle = "#f8fafc"; ctx.strokeStyle = "#0f172a"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, 60, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = "#0f172a"; ctx.font = "bold 12px Inter, sans-serif";
            ctx.fillText("ZRAK (p1)", cx-28, cy+5);

            const tx = cx + 60, ty = cy;
            const path = [
                {x: tx, y: ty},
                {x: tx + 40, y: ty},
                {x: tx + 40, y: ty + 120},
                {x: tx + 100, y: ty + 120},
                {x: tx + 100, y: ty - 100}
            ];

            ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8"; ctx.lineWidth = 14; ctx.lineJoin = "round"; ctx.lineCap = "round";
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(path[0].x, path[0].y);
            path.forEach(p => ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y));
            ctx.stroke();

            const drawInner = (x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) => {
                ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 8;
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
                ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.font = "bold 10px Inter, sans-serif";
                ctx.fillText(label, (x1+x2)/2 + 12, (y1+y2)/2);
            };

            drawInner(tx, ty, tx+40, ty, "#3b82f6", "Voda");
            drawInner(tx+40, ty, tx+40, ty + 60, "#f97316", "Ulje");
            const h3_px = h3 * scale;
            drawInner(tx+100, ty+120, tx+100, ty + 120 - h3_px, "#64748b", "Živa");
        }
        slAlt.oninput = slH3.oninput = update;
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Barometarski (atmosferski) tlak opada s nadmorskom visinom. To znači da će manometar koji mjeri pretlak, pri istom apsolutnom tlaku u spremniku, pokazivati veći otklon na planini nego na razini mora.
</div>

```

***

## Bonus interaktivni sadržaj

### Bonus 1 — Utrka viskoznosti (Stokesov zakon) {.unnumbered}

U ovom widgetu možete vidjeti kako se terminalna brzina pada kuglice mijenja ovisno o viskoznosti fluida i gustoći materijala. Prema Stokesovom zakonu, sila otpora je $F_d = 6 \pi \mu R v$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- BONUS 1: Stokesov Laboratorij -->
<div id="widget-stokes-lab-v2" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <style>
        #widget-stokes-lab-v2 .stokes-v2-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr; gap: 30px; }
        @media (max-width: 900px) { #widget-stokes-lab-v2 .stokes-v2-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-stokes-lab-v2 .stokes-v2-panel { background: white; padding: 25px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; }
        #widget-stokes-lab-v2 .stokes-v2-race { background: white; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; position: relative; height: 500px; overflow: hidden; }
        #widget-stokes-lab-v2 .stokes-v2-btn { background: #3182ce; color: white; border: none; padding: 14px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; }
    </style>

    <div style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:25px;">
        <h4 style="margin:0; color:#1a202c; font-weight:700;">Stokesov Zakon</h4>
    </div>

    <div class="stokes-v2-grid">
        <div class="stokes-v2-panel">
            <div>
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:10px;">Materijal kuglice:</label>
                <select id="s2-mat" style="width:100%; padding:10px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #cbd5e0;">
                    <option value="7800">Čelik (7800 kg/m³)</option>
                    <option value="2700" selected>Aluminij (2700 kg/m³)</option>
                    <option value="1200">Plastika (1200 kg/m³)</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            
            <div>
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:10px;">Polumjer kuglice (R): <span id="s2-val-r" style="color:#3182ce;">5.0</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="s2-slider-r" min="2" max="12" step="0.5" value="5" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <button class="stokes-v2-btn" id="s2-start">🏁 POKRENI EKSPERIMENT</button>
        </div>

        <div class="stokes-v2-race">
            <canvas id="s2-canvas-race" width="550" height="500" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Terminalna brzina ovisi o viskoznosti fluida i razlici gustoća. U gušćim i viskoznijim fluidima terminalna brzina se postiže gotovo trenutno.
</div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cRace = document.getElementById('s2-canvas-race');
        const ctxR = cRace.getContext('2d');

        const btn = document.getElementById('s2-start');
        const slR = document.getElementById('s2-slider-r');
        const matS = document.getElementById('s2-mat');

        const fluids = [
            { n: 'Voda', mu: 0.001, rho: 1000, c: '#3182ce' },
            { n: 'Ulje', mu: 0.05, rho: 900, c: '#ed8936' },
            { n: 'Glicerin', mu: 1.0, rho: 1260, c: '#a0aec0' },
            { n: 'Med', mu: 5.0, rho: 1420, c: '#d69e2e' }
        ];

        let balls = [];
        let isRunning = false;

        function init() {
            const rho_s = parseFloat(matS.value);
            const r_mm = parseFloat(slR.value);
            const R = r_mm / 1000;

            balls = fluids.map((f, i) => ({
                x: 70 + i * 135,
                y: 40,
                v: 0,
                a: 0,
                fluid: f,
                R: R,
                rho_s: rho_s,
                history: [],
                finished: false,
                mass: (4/3) * Math.PI * Math.pow(R, 3) * rho_s,
                fg: (4/3) * Math.PI * Math.pow(R, 3) * rho_s * 9.81,
                fu: (4/3) * Math.PI * Math.pow(R, 3) * f.rho * 9.81,
                fd: 0
            }));
            isRunning = true;
        }

        function update() {
            if(!isRunning) return;
            let moving = false;
            balls.forEach(b => {
                if(b.y < 470) {
                    moving = true;
                    b.fd = 6 * Math.PI * b.fluid.mu * b.R * b.v;
                    const fnet = b.fg - b.fu - b.fd;
                    b.a = fnet / b.mass;
                    b.v += b.a * 0.016;
                    b.y += b.v * 35;
                    b.history.push(b.v);
                } else {
                    b.finished = true;
                }
            });
            if(!moving) isRunning = false;
        }

        function draw() {
            ctxR.clearRect(0,0,550,500);
            fluids.forEach((f, i) => {
                const tx = i * 135;
                // Tube
                ctxR.fillStyle = "#f8fafc";
                ctxR.fillRect(tx+20, 0, 100, 500);
                ctxR.strokeStyle = "#e2e8f0"; ctxR.lineWidth = 2;
                ctxR.strokeRect(tx+20, -5, 100, 510);
                
                // Name
                ctxR.fillStyle = "#94a3b8"; ctxR.font = "bold 11px Arial";
                ctxR.textAlign = "center";
                ctxR.fillText(f.n, tx + 70, 490);
                ctxR.textAlign = "start";
            });

            balls.forEach(b => {
                const r_px = b.R * 1500;
                const grad = ctxR.createRadialGradient(b.x - r_px*0.3, b.y - r_px*0.3, r_px*0.1, b.x, b.y, r_px);
                grad.addColorStop(0, '#fff'); grad.addColorStop(1, '#94a3b8');
                ctxR.fillStyle = grad;
                ctxR.beginPath(); ctxR.arc(b.x, b.y, r_px, 0, Math.PI*2); ctxR.fill();
                ctxR.strokeStyle = "rgba(0,0,0,0.1)"; ctxR.lineWidth = 1; ctxR.stroke();
            });

            requestAnimationFrame(() => { update(); draw(); });
        }

        slR.oninput = (e) => { document.getElementById('s2-val-r').textContent = e.target.value; };
        btn.onclick = init;
        draw();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Bonus 2 — Nenjutnovski Fluidi {.unnumbered}

Razlika između Newtonskih fluida (viskoznost konstantna), shear-thinning (viskoznost pada s brzinom smicanja) i shear-thickening (viskoznost raste).

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- BONUS 2: Reologija fluida -->
<div id="widget-rheology-lab" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <style>
        #widget-rheology-lab .rheo-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr; gap: 30px; }
        @media (max-width: 1000px) { #widget-rheology-lab .rheo-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        #widget-rheology-lab .rheo-panel { background: white; padding: 25px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; }
        #widget-rheology-lab .rheo-visual { background: white; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; position: relative; height: 400px; overflow: hidden; }
        #widget-rheology-lab .rheo-btn { padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; background: white; color: #64748b; font-size: 0.85rem; text-align: left; }
        #widget-rheology-lab .rheo-btn.active { background: #3182ce; color: white; border-color: #3182ce; }
    </style>

    <div style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:20px;">
        <h4 style="margin:0; color:#1a202c; font-weight:700;">Reologija: Nenjutnovski Fluidi</h4>
    </div>

    <div class="rheo-grid">
        <div class="rheo-panel">
            <div style="font-weight:700; font-size:0.75rem; color:#4a5568;">TIP FLUIDA:</div>
            <button class="rheo-btn active" id="rb-newton">💧 Newtonski</button>
            <button class="rheo-btn" id="rb-thin">🍅 Shear-Thinning</button>
            <button class="rheo-btn" id="rb-thick">🌽 Shear-Thickening</button>
            <button class="rheo-btn" id="rb-bingham">🦷 Bingham</button>

            <div style="margin-top:10px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; font-size:0.8rem; margin-bottom:8px;">Brzina smicanja: <span id="rheo-val-shear" style="color:#3182ce;">50</span>%</label>
                <input type="range" id="rheo-slider-shear" min="0" max="100" value="50" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="rheo-visual">
            <canvas id="rheo-canvas-micro" width="550" height="400" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 <b>Fizika:</b> <span id="rheo-theory">Viskoznost je konstantna. Nagib pravca u reogramu je linearan i prolazi kroz ishodište.</span>
</div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cMicro = document.getElementById('rheo-canvas-micro');
        const ctxM = cMicro.getContext('2d');

        const slShear = document.getElementById('rheo-slider-shear');
        const theoryEl = document.getElementById('rheo-theory');

        let currentType = 'newton';
        let particles = Array.from({length: 45}, () => ({
            x: Math.random() * 550,
            y: 50 + Math.random() * 280,
            angle: Math.random() * Math.PI,
            size: 4 + Math.random() * 4
        }));

        const types = {
            newton: {
                name: "Newtonski",
                theory: "Viskoznost je konstantna. Nagib pravca u reogramu je linearan i prolazi kroz ishodište.",
                color: "#3182ce"
            },
            thin: {
                name: "Shear-Thinning",
                theory: "Viskoznost pada s brzinom. Pri većem smicanju, lanci polimera se ravnaju i lakše klize (npr. Krv).",
                color: "#e53e3e"
            },
            thick: {
                name: "Shear-Thickening",
                theory: "Viskoznost raste s brzinom. Čestice se sudaraju i formiraju 'hidroklastere' koji blokiraju tok.",
                color: "#d69e2e"
            },
            bingham: {
                name: "Binghamova plastika",
                theory: "Zahtijeva početno naprezanje (yield stress) da bi fluid uopće potekao. Nakon toga se ponaša linearno.",
                color: "#48bb78"
            }
        };

        function setType(t) {
            currentType = t;
            theoryEl.textContent = types[t].theory;
            document.querySelectorAll('.rheo-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById('rb-' + t).classList.add('active');
        }

        document.getElementById('rb-newton').onclick = () => setType('newton');
        document.getElementById('rb-thin').onclick = () => setType('thin');
        document.getElementById('rb-thick').onclick = () => setType('thick');
        document.getElementById('rb-bingham').onclick = () => setType('bingham');

        function draw() {
            const shear = parseFloat(slShear.value);
            document.getElementById('rheo-val-shear').textContent = shear;

            // 1. Draw Micro Simulation
            ctxM.clearRect(0,0,550,380);

            // Boundary walls
            ctxM.fillStyle = "#edf2f7";
            ctxM.fillRect(0, 0, 550, 40); // Top moving wall
            ctxM.fillRect(0, 340, 550, 40); // Bottom static wall

            // Top wall offset animation
            const offset = (Date.now() * 0.001 * shear) % 40;
            ctxM.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctxM.lineWidth = 2;
            for(let x=-40; x<600; x+=40) {
                ctxM.beginPath(); ctxM.moveTo(x + offset, 0); ctxM.lineTo(x + offset + 10, 40); ctxM.stroke();
            }

            particles.forEach(p => {
                const layerFactor = (340 - p.y) / 300;
                let vel = (shear / 10) * layerFactor;

                // Behavior based on type
                if(currentType === 'thick' && shear > 60) vel *= 0.2; // Clusters slow down

                p.x += vel;
                if(p.x > 550) p.x = 0;

                ctxM.save();
                ctxM.translate(p.x, p.y);

                if(currentType === 'thin') {
                    // Particles align with flow
                    const targetAngle = 0;
                    p.angle += (targetAngle - p.angle) * (shear / 500);
                    ctxM.rotate(p.angle);
                    ctxM.fillStyle = "#e53e3e";
                    ctxM.fillRect(-12, -2, 24, 4);
                } else if(currentType === 'thick') {
                    // Particles form clusters
                    ctxM.fillStyle = shear > 70 ? "#b7791f" : "#d69e2e";
                    ctxM.beginPath(); ctxM.arc(0, 0, p.size, 0, Math.PI*2); ctxM.fill();
                } else if(currentType === 'bingham') {
                    // Static until threshold
                    if(shear < 30) p.x -= vel; // No movement
                    ctxM.fillStyle = "#48bb78";
                    ctxM.fillRect(-5, -5, 10, 10);
                } else {
                    ctxM.fillStyle = "#3182ce";
                    ctxM.beginPath(); ctxM.arc(0, 0, 5, 0, Math.PI*2); ctxM.fill();
                }
                ctxM.restore();
            });

            requestAnimationFrame(draw);
        }

        draw();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```
